text: TIET was established in 1956 and has over 70 years of academic excellence.
Thapar is consistently ranked among India's Top 30 engineering institutes by NIRF.
TIET has international collaborations with universities in 25+ countries.
The campus spans over 250 acres with state-of-the-art research facilities.
Top recruiters include Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Goldman Sachs & more.
The Thapar library houses over 1.5 lakh books and digital resources.
TIET offers 15+ UG and 20+ PG programs across engineering & sciences.
The alumni network includes 60,000+ professionals across the globe.
TIET's incubation center has helped launch 50+ student startups.
